"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\main_exec.dir/objects.a
D:\Development_tools\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\main_exec.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\main_exec.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Development_tools\mingw64\bin\g++.exe  -O2 -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\main_exec.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o main_exec.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmain_exec.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\main_exec.dir\linkLibs.rsp
